use_codes.desc: A METHOD OF TREATING A PATIENT SUFFERING FROM A PAIN ASSOCIATED SLEEP DISTURBANCE COMPRISING ADMINISTERING A LIQUID COMPOSITION FORMULATED INSIDE A SOFT GEL CAPSULE, AS CLAIMED, TO THE PATIENT
